svg.text: EH UNIVERSE — VESSEL CLASSIFICATION FULL REFERENCE
Bureau of Investigation — Internal Design Archive / CLASSIFIED
All classes shown with Type -1(Strike) / -2(Guard) / -3(Support) variants
Design: Elliptical hull / EH Chamber center dome / Drone wing pods / Dark steel-blue / 1 rider per vessel

g.text: 순양함-1: 42,000t / 4,000 drones | -2: 48,000t / CWEH core | -3: 36,000t / Fleet ECM
전함-1: 130,000t / 14,000 drones | -2: 150,000t / Fleet anchor | -3: 100,000t / Mobile HQ
기함: 500,000t / 48,000 drones / φ max pilot only / Council has few
Scaling: Same elliptical design language. Larger = more wing pods, bigger EH dome, thicker hull.

svg.text: II. NEKA EMPIRE — 네카 제국 함대
Design: RIDE crystal growth form / Angular faceted hull / No drones / All crew / Dark gunmetal + silver grain
★ Hull shape reflects RIDE crystalline structure — "Grown, not built." Faceted like obsidian crystal.

g.text: -1 Assault / 9,000t / 650 crew / Boarding primary / Knight Assault concentrated
Longer facets. Thinner hull. More energy slits.
Taller spire antenna. Chemical signal amplifier.
-3 Command: 18,000t / Legion HQ / Chemical signal hub
-1 Assault / 220,000t / 16,000 crew / Hull Cannon (Gladius) / Maximum boarding
-2: 200,000t / Hull Cannon focus / Triarii 3rd line | -3: 180,000t / Grand Legion HQ
1,200,000t / 80,000 crew / 4km / Mobile capital / Throne Hall replica / Tintapin only
"Where the Emperor is, there is Sichor."

svg.text: Design: Modified civilian / Asymmetric / Individually named / No type classification — "Ride what you have"

g.text: Solo rider / 6 drones / 90-second engagement / Named individually
Solo rider / 24 drones / Commands 5 Needles / Small-scale fire support
1~3 crew / 96 drones / Mobile base / Repair + resupply / Cannot be uprooted

svg.text: IV. DESIGN PHILOSOPHY — 외형 설계 철학 대비
Color: Dark steel-blue + violet EH glow
Center: No dome. Hull IS the weapon.
Grown from RIDE, not built from parts
Center: Nothing special. It's all they have.
V. SIZE COMPARISON — 함급 크기 비교
Council — Dark steel-blue composite / EH glow: blue-violet
Neka (normal) — RIDE faceted crystal / Dark gunmetal / Silver grain visible
Neka (energy discharge) — Absolute black / "Darkness breathed out"
Liberation — Irregular matte dark green-grey / Asymmetric / Scratched / Named
★ Neka vessels are not "built" — they are "grown" from RIDE crystal using resonant plasticity.
The hull retains crystalline facets and silver grain patterns. No two ships are geometrically identical.
This is why Neka ships look like obsidian crystals floating in the void.
Bureau of Investigation — Internal Design Archive / CLASSIFIED
무단 유출 시 해당 인원은 오타로 처리된다.
